context: Kubernetes Vault integration using External Secrets Operator

checklist.name: ESO installed via Helm
checklist.description: helm_release resource for External Secrets Operator

checklist.name: Vault Kubernetes auth configured
checklist.description: vault_kubernetes_auth_backend_config with proper k8s_host and CA cert

checklist.name: Vault role bound to service account
ClusterSecretStore connects to Vault
checklist.description: kubectl_manifest for ClusterSecretStore with vault provider config

checklist.name: ExternalSecret syncs Vault secrets
checklist.description: kubectl_manifest for ExternalSecret with proper secretStoreRef

checklist.name: Test secret stored in Vault
checklist.description: vault_kv_secret_v2 resource for testing ESO sync

checklist.name: Proper refreshInterval set
checklist.description: ExternalSecret has appropriate refreshInterval (not too short)

checklist.name: No hardcoded Vault tokens
checklist.description: Uses Kubernetes auth for ESO, not static tokens
